content.text:
All tests pass (5 passing, 30 todo).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `potion: 40` to the BASE_PREMIUMS lookup table in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-16_22-57-46_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts`
- Result: All tests now pass (5 passing)
- Approach: Minimal change - just one new entry in the existing lookup table. The existing `policyBaseFor` and premium calculation logic (10% first-insurance surcharge + 5 G fee) already handles this case correctly: 40 base * 1.10 = 44, ceil(44) + 5 = 49 G as expected.
